raw_block:
–A corrupted form, doubtless, of Judah, and applied to the people 
of the kingdom of Judah and Benjamin2Ki 16:6;25:25;2Ch 32:18
–(After the dissolution of the kingdom of Israel the name was 
applied to all Israelites, as well as to those of the two remaining tribes)
–SeeISRAEL
